name: A Delicate Balance
author: Chris
bootlegger: During setup, the Kazali chooses a number of good players (equal to the number of Minions) and assign each an on-script townsfolk character. Those players are safe from the demon until after Night 3.
Tor is only in play so that players do not see their characters initially. After Kazali setup, all players learn their characters and alignments like normal.
Each selected minion learns one unique out-of-play role.
